name: Somesh Rao's Mint and Coriander Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and soak the tamarind in water for 30 minutes.
2. Clean, pick, and wash the coriander and mint.
3. Separate the pulp from the tamarind and squeeze out the liquid.
4. Grind the coriander, mint, green chili, and onion into a fine paste.
5. Add the tamarind pulp and salt to the paste.
6. Blend everything well until smooth.
7. Transfer the chutney to an airtight jar and refrigerate for up to one week.
